![](/images/content/nexaph-300x211.jpg)
**SNP - Nexaph Pharmacy**
Nexapha or Shanghai Nexa Pharmacy is a US based wholesaler with a website and online payment methods.
While more expensive than the other Dark Gray vendors, they offer superior group testing on even single product.
All products have three vials tested by the vendor. Then all products have vendor paid group testing in which three customers volunteer a vial to be tested.
Additionally, many products have an additional level of customer paid testing.
They also sell single vials, but the prices are quite high.
You might recognize that that some US Research Companies resell Nexaph products. You can recognize this by the colorful caps and crimps and the batch numbers they use.
Their Telegram group is especially helpful and friendly and also announces sales.
I highly recommend waiting for their famous pre-sales in which kits are sold at a discount while waiting for testing. This only happens on certain popular products.
NOTE: They have no coupon codes, even if it shows
Batch Numbering
Nexaph has excellent batch tracking, though only the boxes are labeled. You will have to label individual vials yourselves.
Ordering
Add your item to cart and check out. That easy
Website- <https://www.nexaph.com> (https://www.nexaph.com/)
